infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for voice features in the AI tutor.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Add your Bas Udrus study sessions and group rooms to your calendar so you never miss a session.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Add your Bas Udrus study sessions and group rooms to your calendar so you never miss a session.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Create a study reminder for your next session.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Create a study reminder for your next session.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Snap a photo of your homework for Tony, scan a past-paper page, or take a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pick a photo to ask Tony about, set your profile picture, or upload past papers.
